description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long, ribbed barrel and a prominent upper rail system for mounting accessories. The receiver is robust and angular, with a detachable box magazine located just in front of the pistol grip. The stock is a modern, adjustable type with a straight comb and a thick, textured buttpad for recoil absorption. The pistol grip is ergonomic and textured for secure handling, and the trigger guard is large and rounded, allowing for gloved use. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical shotgun with a ribbed barrel, upper rail, box magazine, and adjustable stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, ribbed barrel, box magazine, and adjustable stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, ribbed barrel, and narrow profile of the upper rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, stock, and detailed receiver contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the adjustable stock and alignment of the barrel and rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbing along the top and a long, vented design
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
